div.h1: Shared Memory: Banks and Access Ports

g.text: 1 | 2 read ports | 2 warps can read simultaneously
2 | 1 write port | 1 warp can write at a time
3 | Atomic port | Serialized for same address
Shared mem is 20-40× faster than global
Stride-2 access | XOR shuffle | idx ^ threadIdx.y
Stride-N access | Transpose in regs | Load row-wise
Random access | Use L1 cache | __ldg() intrinsic

text.tspan: // Each 4-byte word maps to sequential bank
// Each 4-byte word maps to sequential bank
// Coalesced: Each thread reads different bank
// Coalesced: Each thread reads different bank

g.text: float val = s[idx]; // T0→B0, T1→B0, T2→B1, T3→B1
float val = s[row][0]; // All threads read column 0

text.tspan: // Each row offset by 1 → no conflicts!
// Each row offset by 1 → no conflicts!
